title: document intentional :latest tags for brett + docs images, fix docs deploy notes
description:
## Summary
- Extends the existing `CLAUDE.md` callout to include `brett.yaml` and `docs.yaml` alongside `website.yaml` as intentional `:latest` images — eliminates the recurring CI lint warning and prevents future "fix" attempts
- Corrects two stale operational notes: `task docs:deploy` description now reflects the image-based deploy (not ConfigMap), and the gotcha entry clarifies that `docs:configmap:apply` has no effect in prod

## Test plan
- [ ] No code changes — docs-only PR; CI manifest/BATS tests still pass
- [ ] `CLAUDE.md` Gotchas section reads correctly for all three `:latest` images

Closes #744
